source_pr.title: executor: make IndexLookUps in the inner side of IndexJoins support direct reading
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #24256 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: executor: make IndexLookUps in the inner side of IndexJoins support direct reading

### What is changed and how it works?

Please see more details at https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/24256.
In this PR, we:
1. use `IndexLookUp` directly instead of using `PartitionExecForIndexLookUp` to read partition table;
2. remove `PartitionExecForIndexLookUp`;
3. add a test case;


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- executor: make IndexLookUps in the inner side of IndexJoins support direct reading

symptoms: + c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test")
failure_signature: + c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test")
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR adds partition-table support for executor IndexLookUps and includes an exhaustive test that is skipped under race. Skipping under race is perf/quarantine-related and does not provide enough evidence to assign a concrete flaky root cause.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: + c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test")
